parameters.jsCode: const req=$input.first().json;const headers=req.headers||{};const body=req.body||{};const secret=$env.GITHUB_WEBHOOK_SECRET;if(secret){const sig=headers['x-hub-signature-256']||'';if(!sig)throw new Error('Fehlende Webhook-Signatur');const crypto=require('crypto');const exp='sha256='+crypto.createHmac('sha256',secret).update(JSON.stringify(body)).digest('hex');const sigBuf=Buffer.from(sig);const expBuf=Buffer.from(exp);if(sigBuf.length!==expBuf.length||!crypto.timingSafeEqual(sigBuf,expBuf))throw new Error('Ung\u00fcltige Webhook-Signatur');}const ev=headers['x-github-event']||'unknown';const ac=body.action||'';const repo=(body.repository||{}).full_name||'unknown';const sender=(body.sender||{}).login||'unknown';const stype=(body.sender||{}).type||'User';const default_branch=(body.repository||{}).default_branch||'main';let route='ignored';if(ev==='issues'&&ac==='opened')route='issue_opened';else if(ev==='issues'&&ac==='closed')route='issue_closed';else if(ev==='pull_request'&&ac==='closed'&&(body.pull_request||{}).merged)route='pr_merged';else if(ev==='pull_request'&&['opened','synchronize','reopened'].includes(ac))route='pr_opened';else if(ev==='issue_comment'&&ac==='created'&&stype!=='Bot'&&!(body.comment&&(body.comment.body||'').startsWith('\ud83e\udd16')))route='comment_created';else if(ev==='push'&&!body.deleted&&(body.ref||'')==='refs/heads/'+default_branch)route='push_main';else if(ev==='workflow_run'&&ac==='completed'&&(body.workflow_run||{}).conclusion==='failure')route='workflow_failed';return[{json:{event_type:ev,action:ac,repo,sender,sender_type:stype,event_route:route,raw:body,default_branch}}];

const c=$('\ud83d\udd27 Build Issue Prompt').first().json;const resp=$input.first().json;const r=(resp.choices&&resp.choices[0]&&resp.choices[0].message)?resp.choices[0].message.content:(resp.response||resp.content||'');let a={};try{const m=r.match(/\{[\s\S]*\}/);if(m)a=JSON.parse(m[0]);}catch(e){}const lbl=[...(a.labels||[])].filter((v,i,s)=>s.indexOf(v)===i).slice(0,3);return[{json:{...c,labels_to_set:lbl,comment_text:a.comment||'Danke f\u00fcr das Issue!'}}];

const c=$('\ud83d\udd27 Build Changelog Prompt').first().json;const resp=$input.first().json;const r=(resp.choices&&resp.choices[0]&&resp.choices[0].message)?resp.choices[0].message.content:(resp.response||resp.content||'');let a={};try{const m=r.match(/\{[\s\S]*\}/);if(m)a=JSON.parse(m[0]);}catch(e){}const today=new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0];return[{json:{...c,changelog_entry:a.changelog_entry||`- ${c.pr_title}`,semver_bump:a.semver_bump||'patch',release_notes:a.release_notes||c.pr_title,today}}];

const c=$('\ud83d\udd27 Build Updated CHANGELOG').first().json,tags=Array.isArray($input.first().json.response)?$input.first().json.response:[];let v=[0,0,0];for(const t of tags){const r=(t.ref||'').replace('refs/tags/',''),m=r.match(/^v?(\d+)\.(\d+)\.(\d+)$/);if(m){const n=[+m[1],+m[2],+m[3]];if(n[0]>v[0]||(n[0]===v[0]&&n[1]>v[1])||(n[0]===v[0]&&n[1]===v[1]&&n[2]>v[2]))v=n;}}const b=c.semver_bump||'patch';if(b==='major')v=[v[0]+1,0,0];else if(b==='minor')v=[v[0],v[1]+1,0];else v=[v[0],v[1],v[2]+1];const tag=`v${v[0]}.${v[1]}.${v[2]}`;return[{json:{...c,new_tag:tag,rel_body:JSON.stringify({tag_name:tag,name:`Release ${tag}`,body:`${c.release_notes}\n\nPR #${c.pr_number}: ${c.pr_title}`,draft:false,prerelease:false})}}];

const c=$input.first().json,p=c.raw.pull_request||{},[ow,rn]=c.repo.split('/');return[{json:{repo:c.repo,owner:ow,repo_name:rn,pr_number:p.number,pr_title:p.title||'',pr_body:(p.body||'').substring(0,600),pr_author:(p.user||{}).login||c.sender,base:(p.base||{}).ref||'main',head:(p.head||{}).ref||'',additions:p.additions||0,deletions:p.deletions||0,changed_files:p.changed_files||0,files_ep:`/repos/${ow}/${rn}/pulls/${p.number}/files`,comment_ep:`/repos/${ow}/${rn}/issues/${p.number}/comments`}}];

const c=$('🔧 Build PR Review Prompt').first().json;const resp=$input.first().json;const r=(resp.choices&&resp.choices[0]&&resp.choices[0].message)?resp.choices[0].message.content:(resp.response||resp.content||'');let a={};try{const m=r.match(/\{[\s\S]*\}/);if(m)a=JSON.parse(m[0]);}catch(e){}const cc=(a.concerns||[]).map(x=>`- ${x}`).join('
');const sg=(a.suggestions||[]).map(x=>`- ${x}`).join('
');const txt=`🤖 **Code-Review (Claude Code CLI)**

Qualität: \`${a.quality||'?'}\`

${a.comment||''}
${cc?'
**Bedenken:**
'+cc:''}${sg?'
**Vorschläge:**
'+sg:''}

${a.ready_to_merge!==false?'✅ Bereit zum Merge':'⚠️ Bitte Bedenken beachten'}`;return[{json:{...c,comment_text:txt}}];

const c=$('\ud83d\udd27 Build Reply Prompt').first().json;const resp=$input.first().json;const r=(resp.choices&&resp.choices[0]&&resp.choices[0].message)?resp.choices[0].message.content:(resp.response||resp.content||'');let a={};try{const m=r.match(/\{[\s\S]*\}/);if(m)a=JSON.parse(m[0]);}catch(e){}return[{json:{...c,reply_text:a.reply||'Danke f\u00fcr deinen Kommentar!'}}];

const c=$input.first().json,raw=c.raw,[ow,rn]=c.repo.split('/');const commits=(raw.commits||[]).slice(0,10);const sha=raw.after||'';const cs=commits.map(cm=>`- ${(cm.id||'').substring(0,7)}: ${(cm.message||'').split('
')[0]}`).join('
');return[{json:{repo:c.repo,owner:ow,repo_name:rn,sha,branch:(raw.ref||'').replace('refs/heads/',''),pusher:(raw.pusher||{}).name||c.sender,commit_count:commits.length,commit_comment_ep:`/repos/${ow}/${rn}/commits/${sha}/comments`,issues_ep:`/repos/${ow}/${rn}/issues`,prompt:`Du bist Code Quality Analyst für ${c.repo} (Claude Code CLI). Analysiere den Push auf den Hauptbranch und antworte NUR mit JSON.
Branch: ${(raw.ref||'').replace('refs/heads/','')} | Pusher: ${(raw.pusher||{}).name||c.sender} | ${commits.length} Commit(s)

Commits:
${cs}

JSON-Format:
{"summary":"Kurze Zusammenfassung 1-2 Sätze","severity":"none|low|medium|high","concerns":["Bedenken falls vorhanden"],"create_issue":false,"issue_title":"optional bei medium/high","issue_body":"optional"}`}}];

const c=$('🔧 Build Push Prompt').first().json;const resp=$input.first().json;const r=(resp.choices&&resp.choices[0]&&resp.choices[0].message)?resp.choices[0].message.content:(resp.response||resp.content||'');let a={};try{const m=r.match(/\{[\s\S]*\}/);if(m)a=JSON.parse(m[0]);}catch(e){}const sev=a.severity||'none';const cc=(a.concerns||[]).map(x=>`- ${x}`).join('
');return[{json:{...c,summary:a.summary||'Push analysiert',severity:sev,concerns:a.concerns||[],create_issue:a.create_issue===true&&['medium','high'].includes(sev),issue_title:a.issue_title||`Code-Problem: Push von ${c.pusher}`,issue_body:a.issue_body||a.summary||'Automatisch erkanntes Problem.',commit_comment:a.severity==='none'?null:`🤖 **Push-Analyse**

Schwere: \`${sev}\`
${a.summary||''}${cc?'

Bedenken:
'+cc:''}`}}];

const c=$('\ud83d\udd27 Parse WF Analysis').first().json;const resp=$input.first().json;const issues=Array.isArray(resp.response)?resp.response:[];const existing=issues.find(i=>(i.title||'').includes(c.workflow_name))||null;return[{json:{...c,existing_issue_number:existing?existing.number:null,existing_comment_ep:existing?`/repos/${c.owner}/${c.repo_name}/issues/${existing.number}/comments`:null,issue_exists:!!existing}}];

const c=$('\ud83d\udd27 Build Issue Closed Prompt').first().json;const resp=$input.first().json;const r=(resp.choices&&resp.choices[0]&&resp.choices[0].message)?resp.choices[0].message.content:(resp.response||resp.content||'');let a={};try{const m=r.match(/\{[\s\S]*\}/);if(m)a=JSON.parse(m[0]);}catch(e){}return[{json:{...c,comment_text:'\ud83e\udd16 '+(a.comment||'Issue wurde geschlossen. Danke f\u00fcr den Beitrag!')}}];
const c=$input.first().json;return[{json:{ignored:true,event_type:c.event_type,action:c.action,repo:c.repo}}];
